text: English is spoken all over the world.
description: 一般现在被动：am/is/are+过去分词。
examples_json: [{"en":"French is spoken in France.","zh":"法国说法语。"}]

text: The shop is opened at 9 am.
description: 一般现在被动描述日常。
examples_json: [{"en":"The door is locked at night.","zh":"门晚上被锁上。"}]

text: This room is not used very often.
examples_json: [{"en":"These machines are not used anymore.","zh":"这些机器不再用了。"}]

description: 一般过去被动：was/were+过去分词。
examples_json: [{"en":"This house was built in 2000.","zh":"这栋房子建于2000年。"}]

text: The window was broken by a child.
meaning: 窗户被一个孩子打破了。
examples_json: [{"en":"The cake was eaten by the dog.","zh":"蛋糕被狗吃了。"}]
[{"en":"The emails were received this morning.","zh":"邮件今早被收到。"}]

description: 现在完成被动：have/has been+过去分词。
examples_json: [{"en":"The report has been submitted.","zh":"报告已提交。"}]

text: The tickets have been sold out.
description: 现在完成被动常见表达。
examples_json: [{"en":"All the rooms have been booked.","zh":"所有房间都被订了。"}]

text: The meeting will be held online.
description: 将来被动：will be+过去分词。
examples_json: [{"en":"The exam will be held next week.","zh":"考试将在下周举行。"}]

text: The new hospital is going to be opened next year.
description: be going to be+过去分词。
examples_json: [{"en":"The road is going to be repaired.","zh":"这条路将被修复。"}]
[{"en":"This must be finished today.","zh":"这必须在今天完成。"}]

text: The work can be finished by Friday.
meaning: 工作可以在周五前完成。
examples_json: [{"en":"The problem can be solved easily.","zh":"这个问题容易解决。"}]

text: Children should be taught to respect others.
examples_json: [{"en":"The rules should be followed.","zh":"规则应该被遵守。"}]

text: It is said that he is very rich.
description: 固定句型：It is said that。
examples_json: [{"en":"It is said that she can speak 5 languages.","zh":"据说她会说5种语言。"}]

text: It is believed that exercise is good for health.
meaning: 人们相信锻炼对健康有益。
examples_json: [{"en":"It is believed that the meeting will be canceled.","zh":"据信会议会被取消。"}]

text: She is known as a great singer.
examples_json: [{"en":"He is known as an expert in this field.","zh":"他被称为这个领域的专家。"}]
